case_title: SUNSERAE AISHA SMITH VS. SIERRA ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, SUNSERAE AISHA AS TO DEFENDANT SIERRA ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA JOHN ROBERT POWERS ETIQUETTE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
